det_check_template:
proof fn det_va2index(va: usize, r1: (L4Index, L3Index, L2Index, L1Index), r2: (L4Index, L3Index, L2Index, L1Index))
    requires (va_4k_valid(va) || va_2m_valid(va) || va_1g_valid(va)),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.0 == spec_v2l4index(va) && KERNEL_MEM_END_L4INDEX <= r1.0 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r1.1 == spec_v2l3index(va) && r1.1 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r1.2 == spec_v2l2index(va) && r1.2 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r1.3 == spec_v2l1index(va) && r1.3 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r1 == spec_va2index(va))
            &&& (r2.0 == spec_v2l4index(va) && KERNEL_MEM_END_L4INDEX <= r2.0 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r2.1 == spec_v2l3index(va) && r2.1 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r2.2 == spec_v2l2index(va) && r2.2 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r2.3 == spec_v2l1index(va) && r2.3 <= 0x1ff)
            &&& (r2 == spec_va2index(va))
        }) ==> det_va2index_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
